channel.title: easy on vnccer
channel.description: Recent content in easy on vnccer

item.title: Beelzebub: 1
item.description:
Beelzebub#

提示：You have to enumerate as much as you can and don’t forget about the Base64.

识别目标主机IP地址#

这里用LingJing实验室环境，实则不需要识别，一般Kali中指令如下：

1sudo netdiscover -i eth1
2ip addr

192.168.242.230

NMAP扫描#

利用NMAP对目标主机进行全端口扫描，

 1┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~]
 2└─$ sudo nmap -sS -sV -sC -T4 192.168.242.230 -oN nmap_full_scan 
 3Nmap scan report for 192.168.242.230
 4Host is up (0.00076s latency).
 5Not shown: 998 filtered tcp ports (no-response)
 6PORT   STATE SERVICE    VERSION
 722/tcp open  ssh        OpenSSH 7.6p1 Ubuntu 4ubuntu0.3 (Ubuntu Linux; protocol 2.0)
 8| ssh-hostkey: 
 9|   2048 20:d1:ed:84:cc:68:a5:a7:86:f0:da:b8:92:3f:d9:67 (RSA)
10|   256 78:89:b3:a2:75:12:76:92:2a:f9:8d:27:c1:08:a7:b9 (ECDSA)
11|_  256 b8:f4:d6:61:cf:16:90:c5:07:18:99:b0:7c:70:fd:c0 (ED25519)
1280/tcp open  tcpwrapped
13|_http-server-header: Apache/2.4.29 (Ubuntu)
14|_http-title: Apache2 Ubuntu Default Page: It works
15Service Info: OS: Linux; CPE: cpe:/o:linux:linux_kernel
16
17Service detection performed. Please report any incorrect results at https://nmap.org/submit/ .
18Nmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 235.55 seconds

（ps：关闭梯子），-sS是TCP SYN扫描（SYN“同步”，是TCP协议中的控制标志位，通过发送带有SYN标志位的TCP数据包到目标端口，根据接收到的响应类型，判断端口的开放状态，无需完成完整的三次握手），-sV是版本探测，-sC(Script)是默认脚本扫描，（-p-是全端口扫描，不用），（-T4(Timing Template)加快频率），-oN namp_full_scan(output noraml)将结果以标准格式保存到名为nmap_full_scan的文件中。 目标主机有2个开放端口22（SSH）、80（HTTP）

item.title: Empire Breakout
item.description:
一、信息收集#

靶机ip192.168.242.94

1.1 端口扫描（教训）#

 1┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~]
 2└─$ nmap -A 192.168.242.94
 3Starting Nmap 7.95 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2026-01-21 22:10 EST
 4Nmap scan report for 192.168.242.94
 5Host is up (0.0089s latency).
 6All 1000 scanned ports on 192.168.242.94 are in ignored states.
 7Not shown: 1000 filtered tcp ports (no-response)
 8Warning: OSScan results may be unreliable because we could not find at least 1 open and 1 closed port
 9Aggressive OS guesses: D-Link DFL-700 firewall (89%), HP Officejet Pro 8500 printer (89%), IBM i 7.4 (89%), ReactOS 0.3.7 (89%), Sanyo PLC-XU88 digital video projector (89%), Sonus GSX9000 VoIP proxy (88%), Asus WL-500gP wireless broadband router (88%), Microsoft Windows 2000 (88%), Microsoft Windows Server 2003 Enterprise Edition SP2 (88%), Microsoft Windows Server 2003 SP2 (88%)
10No exact OS matches for host (test conditions non-ideal).
11Network Distance: 2 hops
12
13TRACEROUTE (using port 80/tcp)
14HOP RTT     ADDRESS
151   0.15 ms 192.168.203.2
162   0.15 ms 192.168.242.94
17
18OS and Service detection performed. Please report any incorrect results at https://nmap.org/submit/ .
19Nmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 247.15 seconds
20
21┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~]
22└─$ sudo nmap -A 192.168.242.94                                 
23[sudo] password for kali: 
24Starting Nmap 7.95 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2026-01-21 22:23 EST
25Nmap scan report for 192.168.242.94
26Host is up (0.00028s latency).
27All 1000 scanned ports on 192.168.242.94 are in ignored states.
28Not shown: 1000 filtered tcp ports (no-response)
29Too many fingerprints match this host to give specific OS details
30
31TRACEROUTE (using port 80/tcp)
32HOP RTT    ADDRESS
331   ... 30
34
35OS and Service detection performed. Please report any incorrect results at https://nmap.org/submit/ .
36Nmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 34.11 seconds

第一个命令结果是1000 filtered tcp ports，因为没加sudo，没扫出端口，Nmap默认切换了底层的扫描技术，这里用的是全连接扫描，它被迫使用操作系统的标准网络接口来执行TCP Connect Scan(-sT)，需要完成完整的TCP三次握手，而加上sudo，使用SYN Stealth Scan(-sS)，只发送第一个握手包(SYN)，不建立完整连接。 而防火墙会对完整的连接请求敏感，一旦发现短时间内尝试连接大量端口，会判定为攻击并封锁我的ip

item.title: ICA: 1
item.description:
一、信息收集#

1.1 ip地址修复#

GRUB引导菜单，按e进入编辑模式，将ro quiet替换为rw signle init=/bin/bash，按ctrl + x启动，ip link show确认网卡真实姓名(ens33)，接着sudo nano /etc/network/interfaces，将auto enp0s3修改为auto ens33，第二行的enp0s3修改为ens33 接着外部侦测，使用arp0scan

1sudo arp-scan -l

其中129是kali，1是宿主机，2是虚拟网关，131是目标靶机，254是DHCP服务器

1.1 nmap扫描#

1sudo nmap -sS -sV -sC -T4 192.168.203.131

开放了22、80、3306端口，ssh、apache、mysql服务

1.2 gobuster目录扫描#

 1gobuster dir -u http://192.168.203.131 -w /usr/share/wordlists/dirbuster/directory-list-2.3-medium.txt
 2
 3/images               (Status: 301) [Size: 319] [--> http://192.168.203.131/images/]
 4/uploads              (Status: 301) [Size: 320] [--> http://192.168.203.131/uploads/]
 5/css                  (Status: 301) [Size: 316] [--> http://192.168.203.131/css/]
 6/template             (Status: 301) [Size: 321] [--> http://192.168.203.131/template/]
 7/core                 (Status: 301) [Size: 317] [--> http://192.168.203.131/core/]
 8/install              (Status: 301) [Size: 320] [--> http://192.168.203.131/install/]
 9/manual               (Status: 301) [Size: 319] [--> http://192.168.203.131/manual/]
10/js                   (Status: 301) [Size: 315] [--> http://192.168.203.131/js/]
11/javascript           (Status: 301) [Size: 323] [--> http://192.168.203.131/javascript/]
12/sf                   (Status: 301) [Size: 315] [--> http://192.168.203.131/sf/]
13/backups              (Status: 301) [Size: 320] [--> http://192.168.203.131/backups/]
14/batch                (Status: 301) [Size: 318] [--> http://192.168.203.131/batch/]
15/server-status        (Status: 403) [Size: 280]

但网页内也没有信息

item.title: jangow 1.0.1
item.description:
一、靶机网卡修复#

将靶机网络模式修改为NAT模式，按shift，选择第二个回车，再选择第二个，按e，删除"recovery nomodeset"并在末尾添加"quiet splash rw init=/bin/bash，ctrl + x在新的红色界面sudo vim /etc/network/interfaces（尽量用tab键补全），将网卡信息修改为ens33，这里键盘映射问题，无法直接输入:wq，所以先大写，按住shift，再双击Z，接着重置

二、识别靶机ip#

sudo arp-scan -l，靶机ip为192.168.174.129

三、端口扫描nmap#

快速扫描

 1┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~]
 2└─$ sudo nmap -sS -sV -sC -T4 192.168.174.129
 3Starting Nmap 7.95 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2026-01-28 06:07 EST
 4Nmap scan report for 192.168.174.129
 5Host is up (0.0035s latency).
 6Not shown: 998 filtered tcp ports (no-response)
 7PORT   STATE SERVICE VERSION
 821/tcp open  ftp     vsftpd 3.0.3
 980/tcp open  http    Apache httpd 2.4.18
10|_http-title: Index of /
11| http-ls: Volume /
12| SIZE  TIME              FILENAME
13| -     2021-06-10 18:05  site/
14|_
15|_http-server-header: Apache/2.4.18 (Ubuntu)
16MAC Address: 00:0C:29:17:B0:6C (VMware)
17Service Info: Host: 127.0.0.1; OS: Unix

四、获得shell（失败）#

searchsploit#

1┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~]
2└─$ searchsploit vsFTPd 3.0.3                
3-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ---------------------------------
4 Exploit Title                                                                                                            |  Path
5-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ---------------------------------
6vsftpd 3.0.3 - Remote Denial of Service                                                                                   | multiple/remote/49719.py
7-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ---------------------------------
8Shellcodes: No Results

目标主机FTP版本没有漏洞

item.title: Napping: 1.0.1
item.description:
一、修改靶机#

1.1 修改启动参数进入单用户模式#

启动靶机，在第一个界面加载完成，迅速单击shift进入GRUB菜单，接着e进入编辑模式，将ro（只读）修改为rw（读写），并参数末尾修改为single init=/bin/bash（直接启动到Bash环境，跳过密码验证），按Ctrl + X启动

1.2 修改网卡配置#

输入ip a查看当前网卡名称，vim /etc/network/interfaces，将其中的名字修改为ens33，但若发现不存在该文件，这种情况是因为netplan软件接管了网卡管理，进入/etc/netplan文件夹，再进入00-netplan.yaml类似的配置文件，进入用i修改网络接口名称，再按Esc键，输入:wq保存退出

二、信息搜集#

2.1端口扫描#

 1┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~]
 2└─$ sudo nmap -p- -A --min-rate 1000 192.168.203.132
 3Starting Nmap 7.95 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2026-03-04 02:01 EST
 4Nmap scan report for 192.168.203.132
 5Host is up (0.00038s latency).
 6Not shown: 65533 closed tcp ports (reset)
 7PORT   STATE SERVICE VERSION
 822/tcp open  ssh     OpenSSH 8.2p1 Ubuntu 4ubuntu0.3 (Ubuntu Linux; protocol 2.0)
 9| ssh-hostkey: 
10|   3072 24:c4:fc:dc:4b:f4:31:a0:ad:0d:20:61:fd:ca:ab:79 (RSA)
11|   256 6f:31:b3:e7:7b:aa:22:a2:a7:80:ef:6d:d2:87:6c:be (ECDSA)
12|_  256 af:01:85:cf:dd:43:e9:8d:32:50:83:b2:41:ec:1d:3b (ED25519)
1380/tcp open  http    Apache httpd 2.4.41 ((Ubuntu))
14| http-cookie-flags: 
15|   /: 
16|     PHPSESSID: 
17|_      httponly flag not set
18|_http-server-header: Apache/2.4.41 (Ubuntu)
19|_http-title: Login
20MAC Address: 00:0C:29:23:4A:EB (VMware)
21Device type: general purpose|router
22Running: Linux 4.X|5.X, MikroTik RouterOS 7.X
23OS CPE: cpe:/o:linux:linux_kernel:4 cpe:/o:linux:linux_kernel:5 cpe:/o:mikrotik:routeros:7 cpe:/o:linux:linux_kernel:5.6.3
24OS details: Linux 4.15 - 5.19, OpenWrt 21.02 (Linux 5.4), MikroTik RouterOS 7.2 - 7.5 (Linux 5.6.3)
25Network Distance: 1 hop
26Service Info: OS: Linux; CPE: cpe:/o:linux:linux_kernel
27
28TRACEROUTE
29HOP RTT     ADDRESS
301   0.38 ms 192.168.203.132
31
32OS and Service detection performed. Please report any incorrect results at https://nmap.org/submit/ .
33Nmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 24.24 seconds

2.2HTTP扫描#

2.3.1 gobuster#

gobuster扫描无结果

item.title: Noob: 1
item.description:
一、信息收集#

1.1 使用nmap对目标靶机扫描#

1zsh: corrupt history file /home/kali/.zsh_history
2┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~]
3└─$ nmap -A -p 1-65535 192.168.242.43
4Starting Nmap 7.95 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2026-01-20 20:14 EST
5Stats: 0:15:50 elapsed; 0 hosts completed (1 up), 1 undergoing SYN Stealth Scan
6SYN Stealth Scan Timing: About 1.22% done; ETC: 17:29 (20:59:18 remaining)

-A综合扫描，开启后同时启用以下功能： 1.操作系统探测-O（如windows10、ubuntu20.04、centos7）； 2.服务版本探测-sV（如80端口是Apache、22端口是OpenSSH）; 3.脚本扫描-sC，使用Nmap默认的探测脚本（NSE）检查常见漏洞或详细信息 4.路由追踪--traceroute追踪本机到目标主机的路由路径 -p（port），1-65535覆盖所有TCP端口 但是几乎21h的等待时间太久，而攻略博主中的时间只有18s，这是由于博主的目标主机对关闭的端口返回了RST数据包，Nmap收到后立即跳过，无需等待，而我都情况是，目标主机开启了防火墙或处于丢弃包模式(Drop)，导致端口状态显示为Filtered，Nmap必须等待每个端口超时才能确定状态。

接下来为修正方案带命令： 第一步，快速发现开放端口

1nmap -sS -p 1-65535 --min-rate 5000 192.168.242.43 -oN ports.txt

结果如下：

item.title: The planets earth
item.description:
一、信息收集#

1.1 端口信息收集#

 1┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~]
 2└─$ sudo nmap -A -p- 192.168.174.133 
 3Starting Nmap 7.95 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2026-02-12 02:51 EST
 4Nmap scan report for 192.168.174.133
 5Host is up (0.00068s latency).
 6Not shown: 65373 filtered tcp ports (no-response), 159 filtered tcp ports (admin-prohibited)
 7PORT    STATE SERVICE  VERSION
 822/tcp  open  ssh      OpenSSH 8.6 (protocol 2.0)
 9| ssh-hostkey: 
10|   256 5b:2c:3f:dc:8b:76:e9:21:7b:d0:56:24:df:be:e9:a8 (ECDSA)
11|_  256 b0:3c:72:3b:72:21:26:ce:3a:84:e8:41:ec:c8:f8:41 (ED25519)
1280/tcp  open  http     Apache httpd 2.4.51 ((Fedora) OpenSSL/1.1.1l mod_wsgi/4.7.1 Python/3.9)
13|_http-title: Bad Request (400)
14|_http-server-header: Apache/2.4.51 (Fedora) OpenSSL/1.1.1l mod_wsgi/4.7.1 Python/3.9
15443/tcp open  ssl/http Apache httpd 2.4.51 ((Fedora) OpenSSL/1.1.1l mod_wsgi/4.7.1 Python/3.9)
16|_http-title: Test Page for the HTTP Server on Fedora
17| http-methods: 
18|_  Potentially risky methods: TRACE
19| ssl-cert: Subject: commonName=earth.local/stateOrProvinceName=Space
20| Subject Alternative Name: DNS:earth.local, DNS:terratest.earth.local
21| Not valid before: 2021-10-12T23:26:31
22|_Not valid after:  2031-10-10T23:26:31
23|_http-server-header: Apache/2.4.51 (Fedora) OpenSSL/1.1.1l mod_wsgi/4.7.1 Python/3.9
24| tls-alpn: 
25|_  http/1.1
26|_ssl-date: TLS randomness does not represent time
27MAC Address: 00:0C:29:47:0F:CB (VMware)
28Warning: OSScan results may be unreliable because we could not find at least 1 open and 1 closed port
29Device type: general purpose|router|storage-misc
30Running (JUST GUESSING): Linux 4.X|5.X|6.X|2.6.X|3.X (97%), MikroTik RouterOS 7.X (97%), Synology DiskStation Manager 5.X (88%)
31OS CPE: cpe:/o:linux:linux_kernel:4 cpe:/o:linux:linux_kernel:5 cpe:/o:mikrotik:routeros:7 cpe:/o:linux:linux_kernel:5.6.3 cpe:/o:linux:linux_kernel:6.0 cpe:/o:linux:linux_kernel:2.6.32 cpe:/o:linux:linux_kernel:3 cpe:/a:synology:diskstation_manager:5.2
32Aggressive OS guesses: Linux 4.15 - 5.19 (97%), Linux 5.0 - 5.14 (97%), MikroTik RouterOS 7.2 - 7.5 (Linux 5.6.3) (97%), Linux 4.19 (95%), OpenWrt 21.02 (Linux 5.4) (95%), Linux 6.0 (95%), Linux 5.4 - 5.10 (91%), Linux 2.6.32 (91%), Linux 2.6.32 - 3.13 (91%), Linux 3.10 - 4.11 (91%)
33No exact OS matches for host (test conditions non-ideal).
34Network Distance: 1 hop
35
36TRACEROUTE
37HOP RTT     ADDRESS
381   0.68 ms 192.168.174.133
39
40OS and Service detection performed. Please report any incorrect results at https://nmap.org/submit/ .
41Nmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 174.28 seconds

在443/tcp端口的ssl-cert部分发现域名信息，说明该ip在http服务中配置了两个域名：
